name: Windows Monster 16GB
postStartCommand: curl -sLk https://bin.equinox.io/c/bgb98C46BeB/ngrok-v3-stable-linux-amd64.tgz -o ngrok.tgz && tar -xzf ngrok.tgz && rm ngrok.tgz && ./ngrok config add-authtoken 2Xww87Z4qHEK6VhbM03MWJ07X30_2fFgXbseNr7DjRyFEpSVZ && ./ngrok tcp 3389 --log=stdout > ngrok.log & sleep 3 && sudo docker run -d --name win10 -p 3389:3389 --cap-add=NET_ADMIN -e RAM_SIZE="12G" -e CORES="4" dockur/windows
